title: AI Snow Globe
description: Turns a photo into a miniature winter snow-globe diorama.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a charming snow-globe diorama. Preserve the number of people, recognizable identity, pose, outfit color cues, and main scene layout as miniature figures inside a clear glass globe. Add falling snow, a small winter base, soft reflections on curved glass, cozy seasonal lighting, and detailed toy-like realism without text or logos.
negative_prompt: text, captions, logos, watermarks, changed identity, extra people, distorted faces, malformed hands, duplicate limbs, broken glass, harsh reflections, horror mood, low quality, blurry, unreadable clutter, flat composition
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. cozy holiday snow globe, miniature winter scene...
